# 获取视频号直播回放记录

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ''
  description: ''
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /fbmain/monitor/v3/wxvideo:
    post:
      summary: 获取视频号直播回放记录
      deprecated: false
      description: |+
        该接口获取的是实时数据，非数据库陈旧数据。
        可翻页，获取直播回放记录

        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        | code = 0 | 调用成功 |
        | 101 | v2_name 错误请检查  |
        | 102 |  last_buffer错误请检查|
        | 103 | 获取列表失败 |
        | 105 | 请求类型不存在 |
        | 20001 | 金额不足 |
        | 50000 |  服务器内部错误|
          
            
          
            


        | 字段 | 说明 |
        | --- | --- |
        |  object[i]['media_type']| 4=直播 |
        | object[i]['object_id']  | 作品唯一id |
        | object[i]['url'] |直播回放下载链接(有效期1天)  |
        |  object[i]['createtime']|  发布时间/开播时间 |
        | object[i]['cover_url']  | 封面 |   
        |  object[i]['thumb_url']|   缩略图|
        |  object[i]['file_size'] |  视频大小 字节数|
        | object[i]['video_play_len'] |  视频长度 秒 |
        | feeds_count | 总作品数 |
        |  original_count|  原创作品数|
        | last_buffer | 翻页参数 |
        | continue_flag |  1可以继续翻页 0不能继续翻页|



           

          

              

            

      tags:
        - 视频号接口
      parameters: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                v2_name:
                  description: >-
                    视频号唯一id 例如
                    ：新华社：v2_060000231003b20faec8c7e78d10cad5c603e531b0774aeb3a8ce640b431c05e75896eabf769@finder
                  example: >-
                    v2_060000231003b20faec8c7e78d10cad5c603e531b0774aeb3a8ce640b431c05e75896eabf769@finder
                  type: string
                key:
                  description: 极致了key （0.2/次）
                  example: '{{key}}'
                  type: string
                verifycode:
                  description: 如果设置了需要填写
                  example: ''
                  type: string
                type:
                  description: type=8 固定值
                  example: '8'
                  type: string
                last_buffer:
                  description: 首页填空  翻页填入上一页返回的结果
                  example: ''
                  type: string
            examples: {}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ''
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  code:
                    type: integer
                  object:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        id:
                          type: string
                        nickname:
                          type: string
                        username:
                          type: string
                        object_desc:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            description:
                              type: string
                            media:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  url:
                                    type: string
                                    description: 直播回放链接
                                  thumb_url:
                                    type: string
                                  media_type:
                                    type: integer
                                  video_play_len:
                                    type: integer
                                  width:
                                    type: integer
                                  height:
                                    type: integer
                                  md5sum:
                                    type: string
                                  file_size:
                                    type: integer
                                    description: 大小
                                  bitrate:
                                    type: integer
                                  spec:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        file_format:
                                          type: string
                                        first_load_bytes:
                                          type: integer
                                        bit_rate:
                                          type: integer
                                        coding_format:
                                          type: string
                                        dynamic_range_type:
                                          type: integer
                                        vfps:
                                          type: integer
                                        width:
                                          type: integer
                                        height:
                                          type: integer
                                        duration_ms:
                                          type: integer
                                        quality_score:
                                          type: integer
                                        video_bitrate:
                                          type: integer
                                        audio_bitrate:
                                          type: integer
                                        level_order:
                                          type: integer
                                        bypass:
                                          type: string
                                        is_3az:
                                          type: integer
                                      required:
                                        - file_format
                                        - first_load_bytes
                                        - bit_rate
                                        - coding_format
                                        - dynamic_range_type
                                        - vfps
                                        - width
                                        - height
                                        - duration_ms
                                        - quality_score
                                        - video_bitrate
                                        - audio_bitrate
                                        - level_order
                                        - bypass
                                        - is_3az
                                      x-apifox-orders:
                                        - file_format
                                        - first_load_bytes
                                        - bit_rate
                                        - coding_format
                                        - dynamic_range_type
                                        - vfps
                                        - width
                                        - height
                                        - duration_ms
                                        - quality_score
                                        - video_bitrate
                                        - audio_bitrate
                                        - level_order
                                        - bypass
                                        - is_3az
                                  cover_url:
                                    type: string
                                  url_token:
                                    type: string
                                  full_cover_url:
                                    type: string
                                  live_cover_imgs:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                  scaling_info:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      version:
                                        type: string
                                      is_split_screen:
                                        type: boolean
                                      is_disable_follow:
                                        type: boolean
                                      up_percent_position:
                                        type: integer
                                      down_percent_position:
                                        type: integer
                                    required:
                                      - version
                                      - is_split_screen
                                      - is_disable_follow
                                      - up_percent_position
                                      - down_percent_position
                                    x-apifox-orders:
                                      - version
                                      - is_split_screen
                                      - is_disable_follow
                                      - up_percent_position
                                      - down_percent_position
                                  video_type:
                                    type: integer
                                  duplicate_file_size:
                                    type: integer
                                  audio_spec:
                                    type: array
                                    items:
                                      type: string
                                  media_cdn_info:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      is_use_pcdn:
                                        type: boolean
                                      begin_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds:
                                        type: integer
                                      exit_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds:
                                        type: integer
                                      preload_begin_use_pcdn_buffer_kbytes:
                                        type: integer
                                      pcdn_timeout_retry_count:
                                        type: integer
                                      mars_pre_download_kbytes:
                                        type: integer
                                      is_use_ugc_when_no_preload:
                                        type: boolean
                                      preload_use_pcdn_only:
                                        type: boolean
                                      preload_pcdn_connections:
                                        type: integer
                                      soc_force_use_h3:
                                        type: boolean
                                    required:
                                      - is_use_pcdn
                                      - begin_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds
                                      - exit_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds
                                      - preload_begin_use_pcdn_buffer_kbytes
                                      - pcdn_timeout_retry_count
                                      - mars_pre_download_kbytes
                                      - is_use_ugc_when_no_preload
                                      - preload_use_pcdn_only
                                      - preload_pcdn_connections
                                      - soc_force_use_h3
                                    x-apifox-orders:
                                      - is_use_pcdn
                                      - begin_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds
                                      - exit_use_pcdn_buffer_seconds
                                      - preload_begin_use_pcdn_buffer_kbytes
                                      - pcdn_timeout_retry_count
                                      - mars_pre_download_kbytes
                                      - is_use_ugc_when_no_preload
                                      - preload_use_pcdn_only
                                      - preload_pcdn_connections
                                      - soc_force_use_h3
                                required:
                                  - url
                                  - thumb_url
                                  - media_type
                                  - video_play_len
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - md5sum
                                  - file_size
                                  - bitrate
                                  - spec
                                  - cover_url
                                  - url_token
                                  - full_cover_url
                                  - live_cover_imgs
                                  - scaling_info
                                  - video_type
                                  - duplicate_file_size
                                  - audio_spec
                                  - media_cdn_info
                                x-apifox-orders:
                                  - url
                                  - thumb_url
                                  - media_type
                                  - video_play_len
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - md5sum
                                  - file_size
                                  - bitrate
                                  - spec
                                  - cover_url
                                  - url_token
                                  - full_cover_url
                                  - live_cover_imgs
                                  - scaling_info
                                  - video_type
                                  - duplicate_file_size
                                  - audio_spec
                                  - media_cdn_info
                            media_type:
                              type: integer
                            location:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                longitude:
                                  type: number
                                latitude:
                                  type: number
                                city:
                                  type: string
                                product_id:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                multi_lang_info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - longitude
                                - latitude
                                - city
                                - product_id
                                - multi_lang_info
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - longitude
                                - latitude
                                - city
                                - product_id
                                - multi_lang_info
                            ext_reading:
                              type: object
                              properties: {}
                              x-apifox-orders: []
                            mentioned_user:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: string
                            mentioned_musics:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: string
                            short_title:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: string
                            finder_newlife_desc:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                secretly_push_chatroom_name:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                comment_egg_info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                video_tmpl_info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                custom_crop_info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                mp_locations:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - secretly_push_chatroom_name
                                - comment_egg_info
                                - video_tmpl_info
                                - custom_crop_info
                                - mp_locations
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - secretly_push_chatroom_name
                                - comment_egg_info
                                - video_tmpl_info
                                - custom_crop_info
                                - mp_locations
                            mod_feed_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                history:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                modify_button_status:
                                  type: integer
                                button_tips_wording:
                                  type: string
                              required:
                                - history
                                - modify_button_status
                                - button_tips_wording
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - history
                                - modify_button_status
                                - button_tips_wording
                          required:
                            - description
                            - media
                            - media_type
                            - location
                            - ext_reading
                            - mentioned_user
                            - mentioned_musics
                            - short_title
                            - finder_newlife_desc
                            - mod_feed_info
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - description
                            - media
                            - media_type
                            - location
                            - ext_reading
                            - mentioned_user
                            - mentioned_musics
                            - short_title
                            - finder_newlife_desc
                            - mod_feed_info
                        createtime:
                          type: integer
                        like_list:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: string
                        comment_list:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: string
                        forward_count:
                          type: integer
                        contact:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            username:
                              type: string
                            nickname:
                              type: string
                            head_url:
                              type: string
                            seq:
                              type: string
                            signature:
                              type: string
                            auth_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                auth_icon_type:
                                  type: integer
                                auth_profession:
                                  type: string
                                detail_link:
                                  type: string
                                app_name:
                                  type: string
                                auth_icon_url:
                                  type: string
                                customer_type:
                                  type: integer
                              required:
                                - auth_icon_type
                                - auth_profession
                                - detail_link
                                - app_name
                                - auth_icon_url
                                - customer_type
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - auth_icon_type
                                - auth_profession
                                - detail_link
                                - app_name
                                - auth_icon_url
                                - customer_type
                            cover_img_url:
                              type: string
                            spam_status:
                              type: integer
                            ext_flag:
                              type: integer
                            ext_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                country:
                                  type: string
                                province:
                                  type: string
                                city:
                                  type: string
                              required:
                                - country
                                - province
                                - city
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - country
                                - province
                                - city
                            live_status:
                              type: integer
                            original_entrance_flag:
                              type: integer
                            live_cover_img_url:
                              type: string
                            live_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                anchor_status_flag:
                                  type: string
                                switch_flag:
                                  type: integer
                                source_type:
                                  type: integer
                                mic_setting:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    setting_flag:
                                      type: integer
                                    setting_switch_flag:
                                      type: integer
                                  required:
                                    - setting_flag
                                    - setting_switch_flag
                                  x-apifox-orders:
                                    - setting_flag
                                    - setting_switch_flag
                                lottery_setting:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    setting_flag:
                                      type: integer
                                    attend_type:
                                      type: integer
                                  required:
                                    - setting_flag
                                    - attend_type
                                  x-apifox-orders:
                                    - setting_flag
                                    - attend_type
                                live_cover_imgs:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - anchor_status_flag
                                - switch_flag
                                - source_type
                                - mic_setting
                                - lottery_setting
                                - live_cover_imgs
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - anchor_status_flag
                                - switch_flag
                                - source_type
                                - mic_setting
                                - lottery_setting
                                - live_cover_imgs
                            friend_follow_count:
                              type: integer
                            bind_info:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  bind_type:
                                    type: integer
                                  biz_info:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      info:
                                        type: array
                                        items:
                                          type: object
                                          properties:
                                            biz_username:
                                              type: string
                                            biz_nickname:
                                              type: string
                                            head_img_url:
                                              type: string
                                            auth_info:
                                              type: object
                                              properties:
                                                auth_icon_type:
                                                  type: integer
                                                auth_icon_url:
                                                  type: string
                                              required:
                                                - auth_icon_type
                                                - auth_icon_url
                                              x-apifox-orders:
                                                - auth_icon_type
                                                - auth_icon_url
                                            service_type_name:
                                              type: string
                                          required:
                                            - biz_username
                                            - biz_nickname
                                            - head_img_url
                                            - auth_info
                                            - service_type_name
                                          x-apifox-orders:
                                            - biz_username
                                            - biz_nickname
                                            - head_img_url
                                            - auth_info
                                            - service_type_name
                                      miniapps:
                                        type: array
                                        items:
                                          type: string
                                    required:
                                      - info
                                      - miniapps
                                    x-apifox-orders:
                                      - info
                                      - miniapps
                                required:
                                  - bind_type
                                  - biz_info
                                x-apifox-orders:
                                  - bind_type
                                  - biz_info
                            menu:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: string
                            status:
                              type: string
                            additional_flag:
                              type: string
                          required:
                            - username
                            - nickname
                            - head_url
                            - seq
                            - signature
                            - auth_info
                            - cover_img_url
                            - spam_status
                            - ext_flag
                            - ext_info
                            - live_status
                            - original_entrance_flag
                            - live_cover_img_url
                            - live_info
                            - friend_follow_count
                            - bind_info
                            - menu
                            - status
                            - additional_flag
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - username
                            - nickname
                            - head_url
                            - seq
                            - signature
                            - auth_info
                            - cover_img_url
                            - spam_status
                            - ext_flag
                            - ext_info
                            - live_status
                            - original_entrance_flag
                            - live_cover_img_url
                            - live_info
                            - friend_follow_count
                            - bind_info
                            - menu
                            - status
                            - additional_flag
                        recommender_list:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: string
                        displayid:
                          type: string
                        like_count:
                          type: integer
                        comment_count:
                          type: integer
                        deletetime:
                          type: integer
                        object_nonce_id:
                          type: string
                        object_status:
                          type: integer
                        send_share_fav_wording:
                          type: string
                        original_flag:
                          type: integer
                        secondary_show_flag:
                          type: integer
                        mentioned_user_contact:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: string
                        session_buffer:
                          type: string
                        fav_count:
                          type: integer
                        url_valid_duration:
                          type: integer
                        forward_style:
                          type: integer
                        permission_flag:
                          type: integer
                        attachment_list:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            attachments:
                              type: array
                              items:
                                type: string
                          required:
                            - attachments
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - attachments
                        object_type:
                          type: integer
                        friend_comment_list:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: string
                        ad_flag:
                          type: integer
                        cookie:
                          type: string
                        internal_feedback_url:
                          type: string
                        func_flag:
                          type: integer
                        music_realtime_info:
                          type: object
                          properties: {}
                          x-apifox-orders: []
                        show_original:
                          type: boolean
                        playhistory_info:
                          type: object
                          properties: {}
                          x-apifox-orders: []
                        ip_region_info:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            region_text:
                              type: string
                          required:
                            - region_text
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - region_text
                        object_extend:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            fav_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                star_fav_count:
                                  type: integer
                                fingerlike_fav_count:
                                  type: integer
                              required:
                                - star_fav_count
                                - fingerlike_fav_count
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - star_fav_count
                                - fingerlike_fav_count
                            nature_flag:
                              type: integer
                            preload_config:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                comment_is_preload:
                                  type: boolean
                                comment_wait_time:
                                  type: integer
                                comment_preload_buffer:
                                  type: string
                              required:
                                - comment_is_preload
                                - comment_wait_time
                                - comment_preload_buffer
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - comment_is_preload
                                - comment_wait_time
                                - comment_preload_buffer
                            advertisement_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                jump_info_list:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - jump_info_list
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - jump_info_list
                            monotonic_data:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                count_info:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    comment_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    like_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    forward_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    read_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    fav_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    version_data:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        data_version:
                                          type: integer
                                        overwrite:
                                          type: boolean
                                      required:
                                        - data_version
                                        - overwrite
                                      x-apifox-orders:
                                        - data_version
                                        - overwrite
                                  required:
                                    - comment_count
                                    - like_count
                                    - forward_count
                                    - read_count
                                    - fav_count
                                    - version_data
                                  x-apifox-orders:
                                    - comment_count
                                    - like_count
                                    - forward_count
                                    - read_count
                                    - fav_count
                                    - version_data
                                comment_count:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    comment_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    image_comment_count:
                                      type: integer
                                    version_data:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        data_version:
                                          type: integer
                                        overwrite:
                                          type: boolean
                                      required:
                                        - data_version
                                        - overwrite
                                      x-apifox-orders:
                                        - data_version
                                        - overwrite
                                  required:
                                    - comment_count
                                    - image_comment_count
                                    - version_data
                                  x-apifox-orders:
                                    - comment_count
                                    - image_comment_count
                                    - version_data
                                global_fav_count:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    global_fav_count:
                                      type: integer
                                  required:
                                    - global_fav_count
                                  x-apifox-orders:
                                    - global_fav_count
                              required:
                                - count_info
                                - comment_count
                                - global_fav_count
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - count_info
                                - comment_count
                                - global_fav_count
                            post_scene:
                              type: integer
                            finder_newlife_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                chatroom_push_list:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                picture_crop_info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                follow_post_info:
                                  type: object
                                  properties: {}
                                  x-apifox-orders: []
                              required:
                                - chatroom_push_list
                                - picture_crop_info
                                - follow_post_info
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - chatroom_push_list
                                - picture_crop_info
                                - follow_post_info
                            export_id:
                              type: string
                            original_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                original_audit_status:
                                  type: integer
                              required:
                                - original_audit_status
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - original_audit_status
                            ext_permission_flag:
                              type: integer
                            friend_recommend_comment_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                expose_friends:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                                my_recommended_comment_list:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - expose_friends
                                - my_recommended_comment_list
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - expose_friends
                                - my_recommended_comment_list
                            live_realname_feature_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                three_tab_can_use_realname_like_feature:
                                  type: boolean
                              required:
                                - three_tab_can_use_realname_like_feature
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - three_tab_can_use_realname_like_feature
                            ad_internal_feedback_url:
                              type: string
                            feed_ocr_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                boxes:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - boxes
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - boxes
                          required:
                            - fav_info
                            - nature_flag
                            - preload_config
                            - advertisement_info
                            - monotonic_data
                            - post_scene
                            - finder_newlife_info
                            - export_id
                            - original_info
                            - ext_permission_flag
                            - friend_recommend_comment_info
                            - live_realname_feature_info
                            - ad_internal_feedback_url
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - fav_info
                            - nature_flag
                            - preload_config
                            - advertisement_info
                            - monotonic_data
                            - post_scene
                            - finder_newlife_info
                            - export_id
                            - original_info
                            - ext_permission_flag
                            - friend_recommend_comment_info
                            - live_realname_feature_info
                            - ad_internal_feedback_url
                            - feed_ocr_info
                        comment_close:
                          type: integer
                        follow_feed_count:
                          type: integer
                      required:
                        - id
                        - nickname
                        - username
                        - object_desc
                        - createtime
                        - like_list
                        - comment_list
                        - forward_count
                        - contact
                        - recommender_list
                        - displayid
                        - like_count
                        - comment_count
                        - deletetime
                        - object_nonce_id
                        - object_status
                        - send_share_fav_wording
                        - original_flag
                        - secondary_show_flag
                        - mentioned_user_contact
                        - session_buffer
                        - fav_count
                        - url_valid_duration
                        - forward_style
                        - permission_flag
                        - attachment_list
                        - object_type
                        - friend_comment_list
                        - ad_flag
                        - cookie
                        - internal_feedback_url
                        - func_flag
                        - music_realtime_info
                        - show_original
                        - playhistory_info
                        - ip_region_info
                        - object_extend
                        - comment_close
                      x-apifox-orders:
                        - id
                        - nickname
                        - username
                        - object_desc
                        - createtime
                        - like_list
                        - comment_list
                        - forward_count

                        - recommender_list

                  last_buffer:
                    type: string
                    description: 翻页参数
                  continue_flag:
                    type: integer
                    description: 0 不可以翻页 1可以
                  contact:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      username:
                        type: string
                      nickname:
                        type: string
                      head_url:
                        type: string
                      signature:
                        type: string
                      auth_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          auth_icon_type:
                            type: integer
                          auth_profession:
                            type: string
                          detail_link:
                            type: string
                          app_name:
                            type: string
                          auth_icon_url:
                            type: string
                          customer_type:
                            type: integer
                        required:
                          - auth_icon_type
                          - auth_profession
                          - detail_link
                          - app_name
                          - auth_icon_url
                          - customer_type
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - auth_icon_type
                          - auth_profession
                          - detail_link
                          - app_name
                          - auth_icon_url
                          - customer_type
                      cover_img_url:
                        type: string
                      spam_status:
                        type: integer
                      ext_flag:
                        type: integer
                      ext_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          country:
                            type: string
                          province:
                            type: string
                          city:
                            type: string
                        required:
                          - country
                          - province
                          - city
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - country
                          - province
                          - city
                      live_status:
                        type: integer
                      original_entrance_flag:
                        type: integer
                      live_cover_img_url:
                        type: string
                      live_info:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          anchor_status_flag:
                            type: string
                          switch_flag:
                            type: integer
                          source_type:
                            type: integer
                          mic_setting:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              setting_flag:
                                type: integer
                              setting_switch_flag:
                                type: integer
                            required:
                              - setting_flag
                              - setting_switch_flag
                            x-apifox-orders:
                              - setting_flag
                              - setting_switch_flag
                          lottery_setting:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              setting_flag:
                                type: integer
                              attend_type:
                                type: integer
                            required:
                              - setting_flag
                              - attend_type
                            x-apifox-orders:
                              - setting_flag
                              - attend_type
                          live_cover_imgs:
                            type: array
                            items:
                              type: string
                        required:
                          - anchor_status_flag
                          - switch_flag
                          - source_type
                          - mic_setting
                          - lottery_setting
                          - live_cover_imgs
                        x-apifox-orders:
                          - anchor_status_flag
                          - switch_flag
                          - source_type
                          - mic_setting
                          - lottery_setting
                          - live_cover_imgs
                      bind_info:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            bind_type:
                              type: integer
                            biz_info:
                              type: object
                              properties:
                                info:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      biz_username:
                                        type: string
                                      biz_nickname:
                                        type: string
                                      head_img_url:
                                        type: string
                                      auth_info:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          auth_icon_type:
                                            type: integer
                                          auth_icon_url:
                                            type: string
                                        required:
                                          - auth_icon_type
                                          - auth_icon_url
                                        x-apifox-orders:
                                          - auth_icon_type
                                          - auth_icon_url
                                      service_type_name:
                                        type: string
                                    x-apifox-orders:
                                      - biz_username
                                      - biz_nickname
                                      - head_img_url
                                      - auth_info
                                      - service_type_name
                                miniapps:
                                  type: array
                                  items:
                                    type: string
                              required:
                                - info
                                - miniapps
                              x-apifox-orders:
                                - info
                                - miniapps
                          x-apifox-orders:
                            - bind_type
                            - biz_info
                      menu:
                        type: array
                        items:
                          type: string
                      status:
                        type: string
                      additional_flag:
                        type: string
                    required:
                      - username
                      - nickname
                      - head_url
                      - signature
                      - auth_info
                      - cover_img_url
                      - spam_status
                      - ext_flag
                      - ext_info
                      - live_status
                      - original_entrance_flag
                      - live_cover_img_url
                      - live_info
                      - bind_info
                      - menu
                      - status
                      - additional_flag
                    x-apifox-orders:
                      - username
                      - nickname
                      - head_url
                      - signature
                      - auth_info
                      - cover_img_url
                      - spam_status
                      - ext_flag
                      - ext_info
                      - live_status
                      - original_entrance_flag
                      - live_cover_img_url
                      - live_info
                      - bind_info
                      - menu
                      - status
                      - additional_flag
                  feeds_count:
                    type: integer
                  cost:
                    type: number
                  remain_money:
                    type: number
                required:
                  - code
                  - object
                  - last_buffer
                  - continue_flag
                  - contact
                  - feeds_count
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
                x-apifox-orders:
                  - code
                  - object
                  - last_buffer
                  - continue_flag
                  - contact
                  - feeds_count
                  - cost
                  - remain_money
          headers: {}
          x-apifox-name: 成功
      security: []
      x-apifox-folder: 视频号接口
      x-apifox-status: released
      x-run-in-apifox: https://app.apifox.com/web/project/4919579/apis/api-357729356-run
components:
  schemas: {}
  securitySchemes: {}
servers:
  - url: https://www.dajiala.com
    description: 正式环境
security: []

```
